blockingIssues.description: OAuth callback upserts do not set `connection_method: 'oauth'`, so BYOK->OAuth reconnects can leave rows tagged as BYOK and cause incorrect Settings badge state.
Non-Twitter optimize variants are returned without hard post-generation limit enforcement; PLATFORM_LIMITS are not enforced before response.
When AI output uses `---TWEET---` delimiters, thread parts are accepted without validating each part is <= 280 characters.
GenerateOutput does not pass source platform into OptimizePanel, which defaults sourcePlatform to 'instagram' and misattributes optimize/save flows.
Bulk publish success determination reads stale `platformStates` after async publishes, so `onPublishSuccess` may not fire even when publishing succeeds.
Retry path also reads stale state immediately after async publish and can skip success callback after successful retry.
PATCH auto-optimize trigger checks field presence, not value change, causing repeated unintended variant generation during normal autosave flows.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` with explicit `social_accounts.connection_method` lifecycle contract (`byok` for manual keys, `oauth` for callbacks) and dependency of badges/publish fallback on this field.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mandatory blocked-path protocol for auth-required endpoint validation: when valid auth token bootstrap is unavailable, workers must explicitly record blocker and mark `followedProcedure=false` instead of implicitly treating unauthenticated checks as complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Repeated across byok-api-and-storage and optimize-api reviews: only unauthenticated 401 checks were run while procedure step requires valid-auth checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit blocked status when UI verification is auth-gated/unreachable (and disallow `followedProcedure=true` in that condition), with minimum required evidence for attempted agent-browser validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Repeated across optimize-ui-generate, optimize-ui-editor-and-bulk-publish, and auto-optimize-on-save reviews: UI/manual checks were blocked or skipped but procedure adherence was still marked true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add generic auth bootstrap instructions for manual testing.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in `.factory/library/user-testing.md` under 'Auth Bootstrap for Testing'.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add guidance to always check existing git diff early before implementation.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous optimization preference; not a correctness or systemic validation blocker.

rejectedObservations.observation: Multiple repeated notes about missing auth fixture for curl and blocked UI checks.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; consolidated into systemic skill recommendations above.
